# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent kafka topic authorization.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# server.properties

broker.id=1
listeners=SASL_PLAINTEXT://kafka-broker-1:9092
advertised.listeners=SASL_PLAINTEXT://kafka-broker-1:9092
log.dirs=/var/lib/kafka/logs
num.partitions=3
default.replication.factor=3
min.insync.replicas=2

# Zookeeper configuration
zookeeper.connect=zookeeper-1:2181,zookeeper-2:2181,zookeeper-3:2181

# Security settings
sasl.mechanism.inter.broker.protocol=GSSAPI
sasl.enabled.mechanisms=GSSAPI
authorizer.class.name=kafka.security.authorizer.AclAuthorizer
super.users=User:kafka-super-user

# Encryption and authentication
ssl.keystore.location=/etc/kafka/keystore.jks
ssl.keystore.password=changeit
ssl.key.password=changeit
ssl.truststore.location=/etc/kafka/truststore.jks
ssl.truststore.password=changeit
security.inter.broker.protocol=SASL_SSL
sasl.enabled.mechanisms=GSSAPI,PLAIN

# Logging and monitoring
log.retention.hours=168
num.network.threads=3
num.io.threads=8
socket.send.buffer.bytes=102400
socket.receive.buffer.bytes=102400
socket.request.max.bytes=104857600

# Other configurations
auto.create.topics.enable=false
delete.topic.enable=true
